title: PolicyVerdict
description: Deterministic Decision Policy Engine output. This is the ADR-1 Engine verdict returned by evaluate(input), distinct from daimyo's DecisionVerdict wire payload.
$comment: PolicyVerdict is a direct Engine output contract, not an envelope artifact. Protocol wire fields use snake_case.

outcome.description: REQUIRED string. Deterministic policy outcome for the caller.

conflict_class.description: REQUIRED string. Sibling or shared-contract conflict classification.

review_required.description: REQUIRED boolean. True when the verdict requires explicit human review before proceeding.

route_to.description: REQUIRED string or null. Target for routed or stopped decisions.

classified_domain.description: REQUIRED string. Deterministically classified ADR-4 autonomy domain.

classified_scope.description: REQUIRED string. Deterministically classified decision scope.

rationale.description: REQUIRED string. Human-readable deterministic rationale for replay and audit.

matched_rule_refs.description: REQUIRED array. Static rule identifiers that materially affected the verdict.

engine_version.description: REQUIRED string. Decision Policy Engine implementation version.
